query:
SELECT e1.id as id1, e1.name as name1, e1.neighborhood as bairro1, e1.status as status1,
       e2.id as id2, e2.name as name2, e2.neighborhood as bairro2, e2.status as status2,
       e1.address, e1.addressNumber
FROM establishments e1
JOIN establishments e2 ON e1.address = e2.address AND e1.addressNumber = e2.addressNumber AND e1.id < e2.id
WHERE e1.address IS NOT NULL AND e1.address != ''
  AND e1.addressNumber IS NOT NULL AND e1.addressNumber != ''
  AND NOT EXISTS (
    SELECT 1 FROM establishments e3 
    WHERE e3.address = e1.address AND e3.addressNumber = e1.addressNumber 
      AND e3.id != e1.id AND e3.id != e2.id
  )
ORDER BY e1.address, e1.addressNumber
LIMIT 20;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway06.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 4LUtXE4vPqQU3CD.root --database WG3U3sVg2ZrW6m8T99FRdE --execute 
SELECT e1.id as id1, e1.name as name1, e1.neighborhood as bairro1, e1.status as status1,
       e2.id as id2, e2.name as name2, e2.neighborhood as bairro2, e2.status as status2,
       e1.address, e1.addressNumber
FROM establishments e1
JOIN establishments e2 ON e1.address = e2.address AND e1.addressNumber = e2.addressNumber AND e1.id < e2.id
WHERE e1.address IS NOT NULL AND e1.address != ''
  AND e1.addressNumber IS NOT NULL AND e1.addressNumber != ''
  AND NOT EXISTS (
    SELECT 1 FROM establishments e3 
    WHERE e3.address = e1.address AND e3.addressNumber = e1.addressNumber 
      AND e3.id != e1.id AND e3.id != e2.id
  )
ORDER BY e1.address, e1.addressNumber
LIMIT 20;
